title: Gaban
desc: An unemployed son of an honest clerk tries to use his charm to con his way to a better life.

title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

title: Patthar Ke Phool
desc: A young lady having grown up in a household full of love and admiration, Suraj is now a young adult who had no idea her father has been part of a dangerous mafia; she eventually falls in love with a police officer.

title: Saveray Wali Gaadi
desc: Ravidas lives in a village in rural India. He is the son of Chediram who is of highly respected in the village. Ravidas falls in love with Jyoti. Their love becomes known in the village. Because of differences of caste, the villagers are opposed to Ravidas marrying Jyoti. Chediram commits suicide due to the shame his son has brought upon him. Ravidas is a gifted poet, but he cannot fulfill his dream of being recognized as a great poet, his poems being published and shown to the world, because he lives in a village.

title: Maa Beti
desc: Savitri, a wealthy woman who dies during childbirth. Her husband remarries Laxmi, who, influenced by her brother Raghunandan, mistreats Savitri’s children, Meenu and Khetan. The children run away, and years later, Laxmi's daughter, Chanda, discovers the truth about her half-siblings and their tragic past
